retrieved_result: Wyoming 1. Wyoming1 of 10Wyoming is the best state to retire in, according to a list from Bankrate. The group ranked all 50 states based on weather, cost of living, crime, quality of health care, state and local taxes, and general well-being. Wyoming is at the top largely because it has the lowest tax rate
